title: subscription — compliance evidence
description: The billing module is the compliance-heaviest surface. SOX 404 for revenue recognition, PCI-DSS delegated to Cashier + provider, GDPR for financial personal data, and consumer-protection regulations for cancellation UX.

controls.evidence: SubscriptionEvent retained 7y. Each state transition captures from_state / to_state / from_plan / to_plan / amount / actor. Reconciliation job detects Cashier-vs-us drift.
actor_type=user events include actor_id + timestamp. cancel_at_period_end preserves intent-to-cancel timing.
Cashier redirects tokenisation to Stripe Elements / Paddle Checkout. Only provider tokens (pm_xxx / paddle_customer_id) stored. Never see PAN, CVV, or expiry in plaintext.
All provider communication TLS 1.2+ via Cashier's HTTP client.
TenantErased triggers CancelSubscriptionForErasedTenant. Cashier customer deleted at provider. Our SubscriptionEvent rows anonymised (tenant_id hashed) rather than deleted for SOX continuity.
GET /api/v1/subscription/invoices returns full invoice history + JSON export.
SubscriptionEvent IS the record. Every state change auditable.
POST /api/v1/subscription/cancel accepts at_period_end=true|false. UI never buries cancel; retention prompts do not block.
platform.subscriptions.force-state gated to super_admin. Every use audit-logged with reason.
ReconcileSubscriptionStateJob detects Cashier drift. Metrics dashboard alerts on state divergence.
Idempotency on provider_event_id prevents duplicate processing of retried webhooks.
